description: A drum of solvent is found to be leaking in the factory's chemical storage area.

nodes.task_description: An employee reports the leak to the plant safety officer.
The safety officer consults the Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) for the solvent to determine the proper handling and cleanup procedure.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the MSDS for the specific chemical.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the on-site hazardous materials team to contain and clean up the spill.

expected_outcome.expected: The hazmat team is dispatched to the location.
